description: Stabilize navigation active states, product browse UX (category pills, sort controls, skeleton loaders), and ensure proper dark mode treatment across all filter/navigation UI. Fix mobile bottom nav dark mode indicator.
steps: In apps/web/components/product-grid.tsx: (a) Ensure dark mode active state for category pills uses appropriate contrast - active pills should use 'bg-white text-neutral-900 dark:bg-white dark:text-neutral-900' or 'bg-primary text-primary-foreground dark:bg-neutral-100 dark:text-neutral-900'. (b) Inactive pills: 'border border-border bg-card text-muted-foreground' already works for both modes. (c) Ensure the sort select has proper dark styling with visible text. (d) In mobile filter bottom sheet, ensure sort buttons have 'dark:bg-neutral-700' for inactive state and dark text for active. (e) Add aria-label to filter button. (f) Ensure the category rail horizontal scroll does not clip content on the right edge - verify padding-right on the scroll container.

In apps/web/components/mobile-bottom-nav.tsx: Fix the active indicator for dark mode. Currently uses 'bg-black' which is invisible on dark backgrounds. Change to 'bg-neutral-900 dark:bg-white' and update active text: the NavTab active class should be 'text-white dark:text-neutral-900' instead of just 'text-white'. Update the badge (cart count) to remain visible in both modes.

In apps/web/components/header.tsx: Verify the desktop nav active state logic is correct. Currently: 'bg-primary/10 text-primary' for active. In dark mode, text-primary (#050505) would be invisible. Change active state to 'bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:bg-white/10 dark:text-white' or similar to ensure visibility. Inactive state already has dark variants.

In apps/web/components/product-card.tsx: Ensure the product card dark mode has proper border visibility. Add 'dark:border-neutral-800' to the card article element. The bg-neutral-50 image placeholder should become 'bg-neutral-50 dark:bg-neutral-800'. The 'Add' button uses bg-black which works in both modes.
In apps/web/app/globals.css: Ensure .sticky-category-rail has proper dark mode background: add a dark variant that uses the dark background color with backdrop-filter blur.
acceptance_criteria: Desktop nav: active link is clearly visible in both light and dark mode
Desktop nav: Shop is NOT marked active when ?category= or ?sort= is in URL
Category pills: active pill has clear contrast in both modes
Category pills: horizontal scroll works without clipped content
Sort controls: visible text and borders in dark mode
Mobile bottom nav: active indicator visible in both modes (dark bg in light, light bg in dark)
Mobile bottom nav: active tab text contrasts against indicator
Product cards: borders visible in dark mode
Skeleton loaders match card dimensions (existing ProductSkeletonGrid handles this)
No layout jumps when selecting categories or changing sort
verification: Run npx eslint . from apps/web/ and confirm 0 errors
Run npm run test from apps/web/ and confirm tests pass
findings: All fixes applied successfully. Desktop nav active state now visible in dark mode. Category pills and sort controls already had proper dark states from FEAT-001 - only missing pieces were aria-labels, text-foreground on selects, scroll padding for clipping. Product card image placeholders now have dark:bg-neutral-800. Mobile bottom nav was already correct from FEAT-001 (bg-black dark:bg-white indicator). Same pre-existing test failure (security.test.ts test 64 - Upstash rate limiting) as FEAT-001/002. 0 lint errors, 10 warnings (all pre-existing).
